name: Horseradish Sauce
recipeInstructions:
Mix the horseradish, lemon juice, vinegar, sugar, and mustard in a small bowl. Add a pinch of salt. Whip the heavy cream until stiff and fold into the other ingredients. Chill until needed. It is a good idea to chill the horseradish for at least 3 hours before serving.
Makes: 3/4 cup
